description: Vast.ai is a cloud GPU marketplace and compute platform for renting, managing, and automating GPU instances and serverless inference endpoints. It provides infrastructure for launching containers, managing storage and billing, and serving AI workloads.
summary: Vast.ai exposes a documented REST API at `https://console.vast.ai/api/v0` and a Python-packaged `vastai` CLI; both authenticate with a Vast.ai API key.
